name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger and a girl in a tree. The main character was children, tree in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
...When the child first started going to school at 8 years old, she would take his hand from her face so that they could look out across the playground while playing outside together! They both became friends with each other as well as their teachers' parents for life and were inseparable since then. Then one day it happened; no matter how many times he said hello or played catch-up over dinner table - this kid never once stopped talking about trees!!! This is when all those wonderful memories start pouring into my head!! I have been thinking like him ever after!!"
